rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF NATIVIDAD RAMIREZ HERRERA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to April 13, 2015. Although the Examiner's notes asked for a supplemental declaration, petitioner filed an amended petition. An amended pleading requires the same notice, including publication, as the petition it amends (see CRC 7.53). This matter continued to allow for new notice and new publication, with new proof of publication and new proof of service to be filed.
